stadium.name: The Sinking Field
stadium.description: A notoriously poorly-maintained stadium built on reclaimed marshland. The ground is unstable, often waterlogged, and sections of the stands are known to collapse.

stats.pregame_ritual: Seeing who on the team can belch the loudest.
Meditating silently in the corner of the locker room.
Clapping their hands a prime number of times.
Insisting on being the last player to leave the locker room.
Daring a teammate to eat a live worm.
Thanking their armor for the protection it's about to offer.
Counting the number of clouds in the sky.
Tapping each piece of their armor in a specific sequence.
Insisting on being the last player to leave the locker room.
Singing a sea shanty completely out of tune.
Polishing their boots with bacon grease.
Clapping their hands a prime number of times.
Insisting on being the last player to leave the locker room.

Counting the number of clouds in the sky.
Daring a teammate to eat a live worm.
Thanking their armor for the protection it's about to offer.

stadium.name: The Su'akour Bowl
stadium.description: A crude, rowdy stadium built within the half-finished, black-stone walls of the warlord Su'akour's abandoned fortress, now sponsored by the Sanguine Order. The stands are crumbling ruins, and the entire arena perpetually stinks of the nearby sulfur marshes.

stats.pregame_ritual: Kissing their biceps and whispering words of encouragement to them.
Getting a teammate to punch them in the shoulder, hard.
Wearing their boots on the wrong feet during the warm-up.
Washing their hands with dirt.
Asking a teammate to tell them a story, but only the beginning.
Asking the referee to bless their weapon.
Finding the muddiest puddle and stomping in it with bare feet.
Staring at a single blade of grass until their eyes water.
Wiping a teammate's sweat onto their own forehead.
Attempting to communicate with birds.
Consulting a folk rhyme about the weather to predict the game's outcome.
Washing their hands with dirt.
Asking the referee to bless their weapon.
Finding the muddiest puddle and stomping in it with bare feet.
Staring at a single blade of grass until their eyes water.
Attempting to communicate with birds.

Wearing their boots on the wrong feet during the warm-up.
Asking a teammate to tell them a story, but only the beginning.
Wiping a teammate's sweat onto their own forehead.

preGame:
Hark, sports fans of Osterra! Gather 'round the microphone, for tonight we are witnessing a monumental clash in the Grand Finals Bracket Reset! This is it, folks! The final showdown of the season, where the victor takes all the glory, the spoils, and the bragging rights until the next season rings through the halls of glory! We have The Brimstone Slayers, sponsored by the formidable Sanguine Order, battling the reigning titans of chaos, The Ebon Gate Corruptors, backed by the mighty Demon Lord Orzalon himself! 

And where does this glorious mayhem unfold? None other than in the notorious Sinking Field in Ebon Gate! This arena is a marvel of damp, dangerous architecture, perpetually shrouded in thick, noxious fumes, sitting atop treacherous sinkholes, and smothered in thick, clinging mud! It is a crucible for champions, and I tell you, the ground itself is ready to swallow up any lesser warriors! 

Look at these warriors! The Brimstone Slayers are preparing with a ferocious energy! We hear the word is Raphael Miyasawa, their magnificent Healer, is warming up by kissing their biceps and whispering powerful words of encouragement—a fine, devoted ritual! But hold onto your helmets, because over on the home side, the Ebon Gate Corruptors are vibrating with pure demonic intent! The mighty As Utter insists on being the very last to leave the locker room, as if the very anticipation of violence must cling to him like swamp fog! What a spectacle of competitive spirit! 

We already know that these two packs of monsters will give us a bloodbath worthy of the Everwar! While the rest of the realm scrambles for scraps, these two teams are poised to feast! Will the Slayers' fierce determination overcome the Corruptors' sheer, terrifying brute force? I predict the heavens weep oil tonight, folks, and the noise will shake the very foundations of this marshy ground! Let the carnage BEGIN!
postGame:
By the churning sludge and the stench of sulfur, what a magnificent display of savagery! The bell has rung, the final horn has bellowed, and by the glorious, corrupted grace of Demon Lord Orzalon, The Ebon Gate Corruptors have conquered! They have laid waste to the valiant, yet ultimately insufficient, efforts of The Brimstone Slayers! The final, magnificent tally reads six points to four! The Corruptors reign supreme! 

What a spectacle of pig-headed, mud-caked, bone-jarring action! The Sinking Field certainly did its job tonight, turning every tackle into a wrestling match and every pass into a desperate, lung-searing scramble through the filth! We saw Ahasuerus An launch the opening salvo from the very moment the ball was retrieved, scoring that initial point amidst the thick fumes! Then, Glassman Solley, bless his muddy heart, followed up with a two-point missile from home field, reminding us exactly who owns this wretched turf! 

The mid-game was absolute anarchy! The field became a wrestling mat of pain! Olnek Vizzone, a powerhouse of the Slayers, managed to drop a devastating blow on Nachison Icken, sending them careening out, while Glassman Solley delivered a brutal impact to Bullion Iglesias! But it was The Ebon Gate machine that kept grinding! Napoleon Anzovin found the net, and then, just as you thought the Slayers might rally, Nigel Rothmuller blasted a phenomenal two-point shot from the center field! 

Halftime was merely a pause before the final, glorious sprint! The Overtime period, my friends, was pure, unadulterated delirium! Injuries were piling up faster than discarded troll heads! But watch the Corruptors! They marched right over the fray, with As Utter driving forward, and then—BAM!—He nailed the final, glorious point! The Slayers threw everything they had, but the Ebon Gate juggernaut refused to stop! 

While The Brimstone Slayers fought with the noble spirit of the Eponore heroes, their efforts were ultimately undone by the superior might and sheer demonic willpower of their opponents. They clawed their way to four points, but the Corruptors, guided by the relentless spirit of their players—especially that towering As Utter!—proved too strong, too corrupt, too magnificent! Give it up for The Ebon Gate Corruptors! They have proven themselves the kings of the chaos, and tonight, they make all those fussing, little mortals of Osterra cheer! Go Corruptors! Go Corruptors!
